_comment: Claude-lead policy set 2026-06-29 by manager per Chris: 75% Anthropic / 25% OpenAI / 0% Cursor. Chris is on full Claude Max with ample credits; Codex (the single frontend-ui lane) was the usage-limit casualty, so lean on Claude and de-risk Codex concentration. Cursor disabled for now (constrained_providers). 5h rolling limits + non-API billing mean 'too much burn' has little downside per Chris. Standing rule: new unpinned scheduler-created implementation work prefers Claude, then Codex; Cursor lane disabled. constrained_providers = disabled provider lanes; [] means none disabled. NOTE: a 'cursor-conduit bedtime watch' previously auto-reverted this file (see git history 2026-06-25) — that watcher must be reconciled to this policy or it will revert these targets.
